name: Moodle
description: Moodle is an open-source learning management system used worldwide by universities, schools, and training organizations. Its Web Services API allows external applications to manage courses, users, grades, assignments, and enrollments programmatically via REST, SOAP, or XML-RPC protocols.

capabilities.name: list_courses
capabilities.description: Retrieve all courses available on the Moodle site or courses a specific user is enrolled in.

capabilities.name: get_course_contents
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full content structure of a course including sections, modules, activities, and resources.

capabilities.name: list_assignments
capabilities.description: Retrieve all assignments for one or more courses, including due dates, descriptions, and grading settings.

capabilities.name: get_grades
capabilities.description: Retrieve grade items and final grades for a user in a specific course.

capabilities.name: enroll_user
capabilities.description: Enroll a user into a course with a specified role (student, teacher, etc.).

capabilities.name: get_user_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve the profile details of a specific user or the currently authenticated user.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send an instant message to one or more users within the Moodle platform.
